task_completion.description: Clean hard line breaks and apply Justified alignment with 0.5-inch First Line Indent to the three main body paragraphs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The three main body paragraphs should appear as continuous text blocks without awkward mid-sentence line breaks. The text must be flush with both the left and right margins (Justified), and the first line of each paragraph must be indented by 0.5 inches.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' to 'PROSPECTUS SUMMARY' and 'Heading 2' to 'The Company', 'Risk Factors', and 'Selected Financial Data'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'PROSPECTUS SUMMARY' should be visibly larger and styled as Heading 1. 'The Company', 'Risk Factors', and 'Selected Financial Data' should be styled as Heading 2 (distinct from body text and slightly smaller than Heading 1).

task_completion.description: Reconstruct financial data into a 4-column table with right-aligned financial data columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under 'Selected Financial Data', a 4-column table must be visible. The text/numbers in the financial data columns must be aligned to the right.

task_completion.description: Add a right-aligned document header reading 'Project Pegasus - Investment Memorandum'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top margin of the document pages should contain the header text 'Project Pegasus - Investment Memorandum' aligned to the right side of the page.
A large, faint, diagonal text reading 'CONFIDENTIAL' should be visible in the background of the document pages, behind the main text.
The word processor's title bar or a file explorer window should show the document saved as 'project_pegasus_final.docx' in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical word processor to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the document open in a word processor GUI (like LibreOffice Writer) with toolbars and ribbons visible, not just terminal windows or code editors.

integrity.description: Verify the financial data is in a real table structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table should have visible gridlines or table selection handles/borders typical of a word processor table, rather than just spaced-out text using tabs or spaces.

integrity.description: Verify the header and watermark were added using the word processor's built-in features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The header should appear in the designated header area (often separated by a dashed line when editing), and the watermark should be behind the text, not just typed into the body of the document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original document is located at /home/ga/Documents/project_pegasus_raw.docx. The final document must be saved exactly as /home/ga/Documents/project_pegasus_final.docx. The header must contain the text 'Project Pegasus - Investment Memorandum' (case-insensitive check for 'project pegasus'). The watermark must be exactly 'CONFIDENTIAL'.
